title: ipomoea verdcourtii
intro: Ipomoea verdcourtii, also known as the climbing morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant is traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea verdcourtii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea verdcourtii can be made by drying the leaves, roots, or stems, and then using them to create teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
